data.body:
[Triple Drop Campaign Preview]

Starting 5/16 (Mon), Commissions rewards will be tripled in celebration of the 0.5-Year Anniversary! 
Don't miss out this chance to get Activity Reports and Credit Points!

🗓️Period: 5/16 (Mon) 19:00 – 5/23 (Mon) 18:59 (UTC)
